title: fsl-mcp sync: expose the v9 contract/assign/hook surface
manager: Keep fsl-mcp current with v9. assign, the contract quartet (require/ensure/invariant), RTC, and hooks become authorable, so the MCP must validate contracts and explain the transactional and hook semantics it can now see.
cs: Validate require/ensure/invariant; explain RTC and hook timing; simulate with assign/journal semantics where feasible before the proof stack exists.
